name: @firstpick/pi-skill-refactoring-advisor
description_en: Agents should invoke this skill for refactors, code smells, migrations, duplication removal, module splitting, API cleanup, or restructuring plans. Emphasizes small safe steps, behavior preservation, and verification after each change.
description_zh: 代理应在重构、代码异味、迁移、重复删除、模块拆分、API 清理或重组计划时调用此技能。强调小的安全步骤、行为保持和每次更改后的验证。
